name: Wrongful-Termination Arbitration — Reyes
notes: Arbitration case file for Hector Reyes, terminated for an alleged absenteeism violation after 20 years of service. Tracking exhibits, witness prep, and the Step-4 hearing.

name: Attendance-Points Appeal
notes: Challenging discipline issued under the no-fault attendance-points system. Reviewing point accrual records and FMLA-protected absences that should have been excluded.

name: Seniority Bid Grievance
notes: Member bypassed on a job bid despite higher plant seniority. Pulling bid sheets and the seniority roster to test the company's qualification claim.

name: Overtime Equalization Dispute
notes: Skilled-trades members claim overtime was not equalized per Article 8. Compiling the OT distribution log to calculate make-whole hours owed.

name: Safety Line-Speed Grievance
notes: Health-and-safety grievance over line speed exceeding the agreed cycle time on the trim line. Documenting ergonomic injuries and OSHA log entries.

name: Healthcare Premium Grievance
notes: Employer shifted a premium increase onto members mid-contract in violation of the negotiated benefit schedule. Gathering pay stubs showing the deductions.

name: Pension Language Review
notes: Reviewing pension multiplier and early-retirement language ahead of bargaining to flag ambiguities the company has exploited in past denials.

name: Subcontracting Grievance
notes: Maintenance work was contracted out while qualified bargaining-unit members sat idle. Building the case that the subcontracting clause was violated.

name: FMLA Reinstatement
notes: Member denied reinstatement to her former position after approved FMLA leave. Coordinating with counsel on the interference and retaliation claims.

name: Layoff Recall Rights
notes: Laid-off members were not recalled in seniority order when openings posted. Verifying recall list against new hires brought in during the same period.

name: Shift Differential Claim
notes: Afternoon-shift members were paid the wrong differential rate after a schedule change. Calculating back pay owed across the affected pay periods.

name: Discipline Reduction — Coleman
notes: Seeking to reduce a 30-day suspension issued to Andre Coleman to a written warning, arguing the company skipped progressive discipline.

name: Steward Mentoring Cohort
notes: Onboarding and training the spring cohort of new stewards on grievance handling, Weingarten rights, and contract interpretation.

name: New Member Intake Backlog
notes: Clearing the backlog of new-hire orientations and membership cards so members are enrolled and dues authorizations are on file within the contractual window.

name: Grievance Step Tracking
notes: Master tracker for every active grievance and its current step and contractual deadline, so no grievance defaults for missing a timeline.

name: Arbitration Exhibit Prep
notes: Assembling and Bates-numbering exhibits for upcoming arbitrations, including discipline records, policy excerpts, and information-request responses.

name: Member Testimony Prep
notes: Preparing member and steward witnesses for hearing testimony, running mock cross-examination and reviewing prior written statements.

name: Contract Article Research
notes: Researching how comparable AAW locals interpret key contract articles to support our bargaining and grievance positions for 2027.

name: Ratification Logistics
notes: Planning the tentative-agreement ratification vote, including meeting halls, ballots, and member notice for the 2027 contract.

name: Bargaining Survey Analysis
notes: Tabulating the membership bargaining survey to rank priorities like wages, healthcare, and overtime for the 2027 negotiating committee.
